name: Character contradiction: fear of water
description: A character previously afraid of water happily jumps into a lake without transition.

story.title: Lake Trial
story.premise: A goalkeeper grows through psychological trials.

outlines.title: 湖边训练
outlines.summary: 王绍康进入湖边训练场。
outlines.conflict: 他必须面对水边训练的心理压力。

knowledge_gained: 王绍康怕水，靠近深水会失控。

chapter_under_review.content: 王绍康笑着跳进湖里，像终于找到最喜欢的训练方式，没有任何犹豫。
